insights.summary:
Your eye health is a concern, with an Eye Strain Index of 48.5% and a Blink Rate of 13.2 blinks/min, both indicating suboptimal performance. 
   Additionally, your Screen Distance of 42.0 cm is less than healthy range and your Total Usage of 40.8 hours in a short time could be a threat to your eye health.
insights.improvements: It's essential to improve your posture and reduce your screen time. Consider investing in an ergonomic chair and monitor, and take breaks every 20 minutes to look away from your screen.
tips: Maintain a 20-20-20 rule: Every 20 minutes, look away from your screen and focus on something 20 feet away for 20 seconds.
Adjust your monitor distance to 50-70 cm to reduce screen glare and eye strain.
Blink at least 15-20 times per minute to prevent dry eyes and maintain eye lubrication.
Limit your total screen time to around 8 hours per day, including work, entertainment, and social media.
